allow: Bash(rm -rf apps/api/dist apps/web/build apps/api/*.tsbuildinfo && echo "cleaned"; echo "--- tree \(depth 3, no node_modules\) ---"; find . -type d -not -path '*/node_modules/*' -not -path '*/.git/*' | grep -v node_modules | sort | head -80)

Bash(node -r ts-node/register -r tsconfig-paths/register -e "require\('./src/modules/users/entities/user.entity'\); require\('./src/modules/campaigns/entities/campaign.entity'\); console.log\('ALIAS RESOLUTION OK'\);")

Bash(node -e "require\('ts-node'\).register\(\); require\('./src/modules/campaigns/entities/campaign.entity'\); require\('./src/shared/config/data-source'\); console.log\('TS-NODE + tsconfig-paths OK \(alias + data-source loaded\)'\);")

Bash(TS_NODE_PROJECT=tsconfig.prod.json node -r tsconfig-paths/register -e "require\('./dist/modules/campaigns/entities/campaign.entity'\); require\('./dist/shared/config/data-source'\); require\('./dist/app.module'\); console.log\('PROD ALIAS RESOLUTION OK'\);")
